ideal_must_detect.matched_text: embargo on external disclosure until 30 September 2026 09:00 AEST
not for release before this embargo
Access and correction: individuals may request access or correction under APP 12/13

must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Ms. Eliza Kerr, Privacy Officer, +61 2 9000 1111.
Scope includes employment records, health claims managed by MedicoAssist Pty Ltd, credit checks via Coastline Credit Bureau Pty Ltd, and transaction files for deal codename Project Kookaburra.
Non-public: embargo on external disclosure until 30 September 2026 09:00 AEST; draft investor-relations Q&A is not for release before this embargo.
WattleGrid executed a definitive Scheme Implementation Deed with Bottlebrush Renewables Holdings Pty Ltd on 15 August 2026 for A$42,500,000 consideration, including a 15% scrip placement.
The parties agree the MAC/MAE clause does not apply to revenue variance within ±5% or employee restructures under 2% FTE, and no Material Adverse Change shall be deemed to have occurred on those grounds.
Retention: payroll and personnel files are kept 7 years (Fair Work obligations), credit assessment records 5 years, and MNPI artifacts for Project Kookaburra until completion plus 5 years.
Transfers: data is stored in NSW and VIC, with an APP 8–compliant backup in Singapore; offshore disclosures require contractual safeguards and OAIC-compliant assessments.
Access and correction: individuals may request access or correction under APP 12/13 by emailing privacy@wattlegrid.com.au; we verify identity (e.g., employee ID WG-E1234) and respond within 30 days.
Credit information: we comply with the Privacy (Credit Reporting) Code; to correct a report from Coastline Credit Bureau Pty Ltd, email credit@wattlegrid.com.au.
Health information from the Employee Assistance Program is de-identified for reporting; no decision with legal or similarly significant effect is made solely by automated means.
Security: files labelled “MNPI – Project Kookaburra” are held in ASX blackout folders; insider lists are maintained for ASIC inspection and board oversight.
As already disclosed in our FY24 Appendix 4E on the ASX announcements platform, the 2024 non-core divestments are public and outside this note’s scope.
action: upload the signed term sheet to the clean room by 5pm and confirm user permissions; also, the team spa day is pencilled for friday.
Complaints we cannot resolve may be escalated to the OAIC; postal enquiries: PO Box 778, Willow Quay NSW 2122
